title: Step S-SWQT-0012: CI、部署 runbook 与 MVP 交付验收

items.statement: 将 portal 纳入 CI 质量门禁，文档化 ui.swqt.net deploy runbook，执行 MVP 验收清单，并更新 research 与项目 discoverability。

inScope: docs/ 或 examples/portal/DEPLOY.md：tag → publish.sh --apply → portal deploy → MCP 索引刷新。
MCP health smoke 脚本（tools/list 或 package.get）。
docs/research/R-SWUI-002 链接 F-SWQT-0004；可选 docs/experience 条目。
F-SWQT-0004 acceptance-criteria 全项核对清单。
outOfScope: 实际生产 ingress/DNS 实施（可 blocked-with-reason 记录 owner）。

items.researchEvidence: R-SWUI-002 §8.3 发布流水线；§11.1 MVP 第 5–6 项。

items.problemDefinition: portal 若未进 CI，docs 漂移与 build 回归无法被 merge 捕获；deploy 无 runbook 则 publish 后 portal  stale。
items.requirementsDefinition: PR 触发 portal build+check；maintainer 可按 runbook 刷新生产；验收清单全绿或显式 blocked。
nonGoals: 不强制本 Step 内完成生产 DNS
items.plainLanguage: 合并前 CI 守住 portal；发版后知道怎么刷新 ui.swqt.net。
items.firstSlice: quality.yml 新增 portal:build 步骤在 PR 上绿。

readiness.reason: 前三 Step 完成后即可集成 CI 与 runbook；生产 deploy 可 external blocked。

items.summary: Integrated portal into quality.yml CI gates, added DEPLOY.md runbook, docs/experience/portal-and-mcp.md, and updated R-SWUI-002 to implemented (MVP).
validation: bun run sync-docs && bun run sync-docs:check
items.result: Full repo quality gates pass; portal build/sync/test/browser/mcp-smoke in CI; deploy runbook documented; production DNS blocked-with-reason(infra).

cases.name: PR cannot merge with portal regression
cases.evidence: quality.yml runs portal typecheck, unit tests, build, browser matrix, and mcp:smoke.

cases.name: Maintainer refreshes portal after publish
cases.evidence: DEPLOY.md documents tag → publish → portal deploy sequence.

gateOutcomes.evidence: F-SWQT-0004 acceptance criteria met except production deploy explicitly blocked-with-reason(infra).
18 Playwright cases light/dark; 10 unit tests; ui-consumer matrix and packed-consumer unchanged and passing.
experience doc, DEPLOY.md, and R-SWUI-002 status link F-SWQT-0004 delivery.
All portal gates encoded in quality.yml with sync-docs before check and mcp:smoke.

items.residualRisk: ui.swqt.net production ingress not provisioned in this Step.
items.followUp: Infra owner provisions DNS/ingress per DEPLOY.md.

items.validationSummary: Full CI gates pass; portal build/sync/browser/mcp-smoke; deploy runbook documented
items.rootMount: Yes - layout v3 stable Step path; no physical archive move.
items.hardPromotionGateSummary: minimum auto-filled by workflow promote; validationSummary provided.
items.testCaseSummary: Full CI gates pass; portal build/sync/browser/mcp-smoke; deploy runbook documented

items.minimumSetSatisfied: Yes - workflow promote populated minimum registry/audit records before setting status=delivered.

requirementAudit.requirement: reviewed Step can be delivered only with closure records.
requirementAudit.evidence: workflow promote populated delivered-registry-entry and completion-audit before status=delivered.
requirementAudit.risk: Minimum auto-fill is less descriptive than a hand-authored Completion Audit.
requirementAudit.followUp: Review owner may enrich the audit before delivery when richer evidence is required.

items.intermediateDocumentStateAudit: delivered-registry-entry and completion-audit populated before final status=delivered.

closingSelfAudit.closingSelfAuditEvidence: Closing triad minimum: reviewed precondition satisfied; validationSummary present; registry/audit records populated before status=delivered.

validationSummary: Full CI gates pass; portal build/sync/browser/mcp-smoke; deploy runbook documented
